title: Logos — Pioneering a New Era of Freedom
description: Logos is a movement building open technology to enable and restore civil society.
heading: Pioneering a New Era of Freedom

sections.headline:
Pioneering a New Era
of Freedom
sections.body: LOGOS is a movement building open technology to enable and restore civil society.

cards.title: Build
cards.description: Everything you need to start building privacy-first decentralised applications. Explore ideas, find bounties, and connect with others.

cards.title: Node Program
cards.description: The Node Program is for anyone who wants to join our movement to revitalise civil society using decentralised technologies.

cards.title: Circles
cards.description: Local chapters are at the heart of our movement. Learn civil organising, share skills, and forge new connections.

sections.body: The system is no longer working for us, so we are charting a new course. Logos exists at the intersection of human exploration and technological revolution. We are a movement for builders, explorers, and dreamers who refuse to accept the world as it is — part of a generation fed up with corruption, surveillance, and stagnation often associated with incumbent institutions.

sections.eyebrow: A unified ecosystem. Private-by-default. Built for real life.
sections.title: The Logos Technology Stack

pillars.title: Storage
pillars.body: Codex storage with reproducible attestation and graceful client-side fallback.

pillars.title: Messaging
pillars.body: Waku-based peer-to-peer messaging that survives hostile networks.

pillars.title: Blockchain
pillars.body: Privacy-preserving consensus designed for sovereign communities.

pillars.title: User Modules
pillars.body: Wallet, chat, files, and explorer modules composing into the Logos App.

sections.networkingTitle: The Networking Stack: Discovery, Peering, and Mix-Net

sections.heading: Use Cases
sections.subheading: We know today's systems are captured and brittle. We build alternatives to give people a choice. Build on Logos and serve your community.
sections.subheadingExtra: Privacy-preserving blockchain for sovereign order and decentralised governance.

cards.title: Attack-Resistant Public Registries
cards.description: Privacy-preserving blockchain for sovereign order and decentralised governance.

cards.title: Decentralized Archives
cards.description: Permanent, censorship-proof preservation of knowledge, culture, and history.

cards.title: Private Financial Networks
cards.description: Money that moves securely and freely, without surveillance or control.

cards.title: Community Governance Processes
cards.description: Self-organising groups can establish and enforce their own rules, with members engaging voluntarily.

cards.title: Autonomous Local Markets
cards.description: Community-run markets coordinate exchange without relying on captured intermediaries.

cards.title: Resilient Knowledge Commons
cards.description: Archives, media, and public records remain available even when platforms disappear.

cards.title: Private Civic Infrastructure
cards.description: Groups can coordinate, fund, and govern shared resources with privacy by default.

title.rest: is a two-day event in Lisbon where music, art, and technology converge.

sections.title: The Logos Builder Portal
sections.description: Operate early. Help harden a private-by-default network that protects civil liberties and strengthens trust in our communities.

title.rest: is a two-day event in Lisbon where music, art, and technology converge.

body: These meetups are essential for anyone taking action with us. Explore what nonviolence is, how we use it, and what it can help us achieve. If there isn't a Logos Circle listed in your area, please get in touch with the team.
